scripts.sidecar:serve: node scripts/portable-run.mjs python -m uvicorn gongmu_sidecar.app:create_app --factory --app-dir services/sidecar/src --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765
scripts.verify:all: npm run sidecar:test && npm run desktop:test && npm run desktop:build && node scripts/portable-run.mjs cargo check --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
